title: Incorrect result for COUNT(), UTF16be encoding and SUBSTR
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value BYTEA);
INSERT INTO t1(name, value) VALUES ('test1', decode('00FF', 'hex'));
INSERT INTO t1(name, value) VALUES ('test2', decode('0000', 'hex'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE SUBSTR(value::text, 1, 1) = decode('00', 'hex');
key_bug_features: COUNT() with SUBSTR on UTF16be encoded data
